quiz.title: Ultra-Processed Food Check
quiz.description: Discover how much ultra-processed food is in your diet and get personalized recommendations.
quiz.promptIntent: Help users assess their ultra-processed food consumption through questions about breakfast habits, label reading, home cooking, and fast food frequency, then recommend Olive based on their score.

questions.title: What does your typical breakfast look like?
questions.description: Think about what you eat most mornings.

options.label: Eggs, oatmeal, fruit, or homemade smoothies
Packaged cereal, granola bars, or yogurt cups
Fast food breakfast sandwich or pastries

questions.title: Do you regularly read ingredient labels when shopping?
questions.description: This helps you identify ultra-processed foods with long ingredient lists.

questions.title: How many meals per week do you cook at home from scratch?
questions.description: Count meals where you use whole ingredients, not pre-made or frozen meals.

questions.title: How often do you eat fast food or takeout?
questions.description: Include restaurant meals, delivery, and drive-through.

bands.title: High Ultra-Processed Food Intake
bands.description: Your diet includes a significant amount of ultra-processed foods. Making small changes like cooking more meals at home and reading ingredient labels can have a big impact on your health. Olive can help you transition to whole foods with personalized meal plans and guidance.

bands.title: Moderate Ultra-Processed Food Intake
bands.description: You're making some good choices, but there's room for improvement. Reducing packaged foods and increasing home cooking could help you feel better and have more energy. Olive offers tools to make this transition easier.

bands.title: Low Ultra-Processed Food Intake
bands.description: Great work! You're already prioritizing whole foods in your diet. You might benefit from fine-tuning your approach or discovering new recipes. Olive can help you maintain these healthy habits and explore new options.

bands.title: Minimal Ultra-Processed Food Intake
bands.description: Excellent! You're eating mostly whole foods and have strong healthy eating habits. Keep up the great work. Olive can support you with recipe inspiration and help you stay on track.
